app.name: Automation
app.title: Automations
delete.confirmMessage: "{name}" and its run history will be removed.
delete.confirmMessageDefault: This automation and its run history will be removed.
form.promptPlaceholder: Add prompt e.g. look for crashes in $sentry
form.title: Title
templates.title: Templates
template.bugScan.name: Recent commit bug scan
template.bugScan.prompt: Scan recent commits since the last run, or the last 24 hours if no prior run exists. Identify likely bugs, explain evidence, and propose minimal fixes. Do not change files unless the fix is clearly scoped.
template.bugScan.title: Scan recent commits for likely bugs and propose minimal fixes.
template.ci.name: CI failure summary
template.ci.prompt: Summarize CI failures and flaky tests from the last CI window. Identify repeated failures, likely owners, and the top fixes to try first.
template.ci.title: Summarize CI failures and flaky tests.
template.cleanup.name: Cleanup candidates
template.cleanup.prompt: Find stale branches, abandoned TODOs, and cleanup candidates worth addressing. Only include items with clear ownership and practical value.
template.cleanup.title: Find stale branches, TODOs, and cleanup candidates.
template.game.name: Small classic game
template.game.prompt: Create a small classic game with minimal scope. Keep the first version playable, avoid unrelated features, and verify it runs locally.
template.game.title: Create a small classic game with minimal scope.
template.regression.name: Regression watch
template.regression.prompt: Compare recent changes to available benchmarks or traces. Flag likely regressions early with evidence, affected areas, and suggested next checks.
template.regression.title: Compare recent changes to benchmarks or traces.
template.releaseNotes.name: Weekly release notes
template.releaseNotes.prompt: Draft weekly release notes from merged PRs. Group by user-visible impact, include links when available, and keep wording concise.
template.releaseNotes.title: Draft weekly release notes from merged PRs.
template.reviewReady.name: Merge readiness review
template.reviewReady.prompt: Review open work and list the smallest actions needed to make it mergeable. Prioritize correctness, missing tests, and unresolved review comments.
template.reviewReady.title: List the smallest actions needed to make work mergeable.
template.skills.name: Skill growth suggestions
template.skills.prompt: Review recent PRs and review feedback. Suggest the next skills to deepen, grounded in repeated patterns and concrete examples.
template.skills.title: Suggest next skills to deepen from recent PRs.
template.standup.name: Standup git summary
template.standup.prompt: Summarize yesterday's git activity for standup. Include merged work, notable in-progress branches, review activity, and blockers that need follow-up.
template.standup.title: Summarize yesterday's git activity for standup.
template.weeklyUpdate.name: Weekly engineering update
template.weeklyUpdate.prompt: Synthesize this week's PRs, rollouts, incidents, and reviews into a weekly update. Separate shipped work, risks, incidents, and next actions.
template.weeklyUpdate.title: Synthesize this week's work into a weekly update.
